category_sources: source_facts.description says SQLite extension providing 256-bit AES encryption; official Zetetic SQLCipher pages describe transparent secure 256-bit AES encryption for SQLite database files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sqlcipher; official Zetetic pages and GitHub repository use SQLCipher capitalization.
docs_sources: Dedicated official Zetetic SQLCipher documentation page lists general information, API, performance, platform guides, and community edition docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/sqlcipher/sqlcipher, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQLite AES encryption; official Zetetic documentation and about pages describe SQLCipher as an SQLite database encryption extension maintained by Zetetic.
